description: Add process lifecycle tracking to Cove Nexus Foxy Mode. Main process owns a processRegistry Map; renderer mirrors state via push IPC events (cove:process:update). Adds duplicate launch prevention, live status pills on the session page (Running / Launching / Not running / Failed), "Focus App" conservative action (tab activation + toast, no OS focus hacks), and a subtle running dot on grid cards. Files changed: main.js, preload.js, renderer/assets/launcher.js, renderer/index.html. Deferred: OS focus hacks, tab persistence, multi-instance awareness, protocol layer.
title: Foxy Mode v2 — process tracking / running state
